text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, March 08. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the telemetry feeds. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I checked the telemetry feeds. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! That's a big step. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Good weekend progress on home projects. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
